title: Travel & Comparisons
cefrDescriptors: Can talk about travel and means of transport.
Can compare two things using the comparative.
concept:
This unit pairs a useful theme — travel — with a genuinely powerful grammar tool: the comparative, for saying one thing is more, less, or as something as another.

The pattern wraps around an adjective and uses que for "than/as":
  plus … que  = more … than   →  Paris est plus grand que Lyon.
  moins … que = less … than   →  Le train est moins cher que l'avion.
  aussi … que = as … as       →  Nice est aussi belle que Cannes.
The adjective still AGREES with the first noun: « Lyon est plus petit » but « Nice est plus petite ». One common irregular to note: bon (good) → meilleur (better), not « plus bon ».

With travel words you can compare real options: voyager (to travel), le voyage (trip), le pays (country), le monde (world). For getting around, French uses en with most transport: en train, en avion, en bus, en voiture — and you'll want un billet (a ticket).

A quick bonus pronoun: y replaces a place introduced by à. Instead of « Je vais à Paris », once Paris is known you can say « J'y vais » (I'm going there). It sits before the verb.

Put it to work: « J'aime voyager. La France est plus grande que la Belgique, et le train est moins cher que l'avion. »

Compare two cities or countries you know, out loud, using plus … que and moins … que.

vocabulary.exampleFr: La France est un beau pays.

vocabulary.exampleEn: I want to see the world.

vocabulary.exampleFr: Je vais à Paris en train.
vocabulary.exampleEn: I'm going to Paris by train.

vocabulary.exampleFr: Paris est plus grand que Lyon.
Le train est moins cher que l'avion.
vocabulary.exampleEn: The train is less expensive than the plane.

vocabulary.exampleFr: Nice est aussi belle que Cannes.
vocabulary.exampleEn: Nice is as beautiful as Cannes.

examples.fr: Paris est plus grand que Lyon.
Le train est moins cher que l'avion.
examples.en: The train is cheaper than the plane.

examples.fr: Nice est aussi belle que Cannes.
examples.en: Nice is as beautiful as Cannes.
